title: Run new automations on existing/old data
excerpt: I’d like to be able to run newly created automations on old or existing data in my CRM.

posts.author: dparibello (David Paribello)
posts.cookedHtml: I’d like to be able to run newly created automations on old or existing data in my CRM.

posts.author: schosm (Steve Schoultz)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi David, I often add a temp text column & then make a copy of the automation & say ‘When temp changes do etc’ Then just bulk update the value of the temp column & the automation runs against all items.

posts.author: NatalieMoore (Natalie)
posts.cookedHtml: This has saved me so much time, thank you so much.
